title: Mode of administration; donor's right to prescribe
doc_html:
§383.  Mode of administration; donor's right to prescribe

The donor may prescribe the manner in which the property shall be administered and the object to which it or any part thereof, or the revenues from the same, shall be applied.
doc_text:
§383.  Mode of administration; donor's right to prescribe
The donor may prescribe the manner in which the property shall be administered and the object to which it or any part thereof, or the revenues from the same, shall be applied.
